subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 741356809/240629519 is not a GRB
body:
R. Hamburg (CNRS/IN2P3/IJCLab) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 741356809/240629519 at 12:26:44.50 UT
on 29 June 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles."
